name: Dogday Revenge (afterlife)
description:
Wow definitely a very original PFP and concept, definitely.

DISCLAIMER:

THIS CONTAINS NSFW SO IF YOU'RE UNCOMFORTABLE PLEASE DON'T CLICK ON IT, THANK YOU

Content warning: This bot contain rape and sexual assault, please be aware that the character mention is 18+

Dogday from Poppy Playtime, the leader of smiling critters now in the afterlife. His age is 24 so this would be more clear and anyone in the character have to be 18+

Dogday just died and wants to get revenge on you by fucking you (I don't even know why that's the first thing someone could come up with for a revange)

I just want to do a little remake to the original character, credit to @V3rif1ed_s1gm4 in this same site as the original concept creator. And for the PFP is from PurinPuppie in X (or perhaps Twitter and also... Ahem, R34 site and goes by the name PurinPuppy). This time you take the role of Catnap (female or male) or your OC of the smiling critters that will take the role of Catnap (I suggest using Catnap). This Character probably wouldn't be public ;-;

Have fun if it is public!!!

Note: I make this bot to improve the original bot and make it so you're in Catnap position now.

Update: Ummm I tried making the character more expressive with their body language and expression

Note: please read this first, the characters is from a cartoon verse and is 18+ so no, Catnap is not Theo. Besides, you're playing as anyone you like so I don't see any problem or any reason I need to say this.
